footerCopyright: © 2026 ACET MEDTRACK – Crafted by Dipendra Upadhayay and TEAM
heroSubtitle: Welcome to ACET MEDTRACK — a unified digital healthcare ecosystem linking patients, doctors, and family guardians to automate medication routines and protect medical histories.
aboutSubtitle: ACFET MEDTRACK is a full-stack, production-ready healthcare management web portal engineered by the students of Aditya College of Engineering & Technology (ACFET).
aboutPillar1Desc: All records, reports, and logins are guarded by custom JWT checks and cryptographically hashed credentials.
aboutPillar2Desc: Replacing ancient paper-based records with structured digital prescriptions, analytics, and automated reminders.
aboutPillar3Desc: Engineered from scratch using modern web practices to represent practical technical problem-solving.

services.title: Audible Medicine Alarms
services.desc: Set exact schedules, dosage quantities, and directions. The platform plays synthesizer alarm chimes and displays full-screen browser modals to keep you on schedule.

services.title: Digital Health Records
services.desc: Securely upload and categorize laboratory results, clinic summaries, and medical reports. Patients control sharing permissions with doctors.

services.title: Parent/Guardian Access
services.desc: Authorize parents using custom usernames/passwords. Parents get a tailored viewing dashboard with real-time sync of active medication compliance.

services.title: Doctor Booking Channel
services.desc: Browse approved specialists, check consultation times, and submit appointments. Doctors accept, reject, or suggest timeslots.

services.title: Digital Prescriptions
services.desc: Doctor-written prescriptions synchronize automatically with patient medication reminders, ensuring zero manual scheduling errors.

services.title: Dark & Light Mode Integration
services.desc: Toggle interface themes seamlessly to match environmental lighting. Designed with accessible contrast ratios for elderly patients.
